title: Select and integrate a chart visualization library
description:
Evaluate and select a React chart library for the stacked bar chart in the metrics view, then integrate it into the project.

Requirements:
- React-compatible
- Fully styleable: no opinionated default themes that conflict with the Kanbus design system; must support custom colors, fonts, and spacing via CSS or props
- Supports stacked bar charts
- Actively maintained
- Reasonably small bundle size impact

Candidates to evaluate (not exhaustive): Recharts, Victory, Nivo, visx (Airbnb), Chart.js via react-chartjs-2

Deliverable: A brief comparison note in the PR/commit explaining why the chosen library was selected, then install and add it to the console app package.json.
creator: ryan.porter

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Selected Visx (Airbnb) for the metrics chart: it is unopinionated/stylable, supports stacked bars via primitives, and keeps bundle impact smaller than charting suites like Nivo/Victory while remaining actively maintained.
